claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: OpenRouter provides a unified API that gives you access to hundreds of AI models through a single endpoint, while automatically handling fallbacks and selecting the most cost-effective options.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The link to 'Pricing' is accessible directly from the homepage.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: The documentation is accessible without login at https://openrouter.ai/docs/quickstart.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: OpenRouter provides a unified API that gives you access to hundreds of AI models through a single endpoint, while automatically handling fallbacks and selecting the most cost-effective options.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: "Data Policy-Based Routing" and "Managed Policy Enforcement" are mentioned in the pricing section.
